scope: Harvard Mathematics + Harvard Applied Mathematics professors only

entries.name: Auroux, Denis
entries.education_history: École Normale Supérieure, Paris; Licence and Maîtrise in Mathematics, Université Paris VII (1994); DEA in Mathematics, École Polytechnique (1995); PhD in Mathematics, École Polytechnique (degree completed 1999); Habilitation à Diriger les Recherches in Mathematics, Université Paris-Sud (2003).
entries.work_professional_background: Allocataire Moniteur, Université de Cergy-Pontoise (1997-1999); C.L.E. Moore Instructor, MIT (1999-2002); CNRS Chargé de Recherches, École Polytechnique (2000-2003); Assistant Professor of Mathematics, MIT (2002-2004); Associate Professor of Mathematics, MIT (2004-2009, tenure from 2006); Professor of Mathematics, MIT (2009-2011, on leave); Professor of Mathematics, UC Berkeley (2009-2018); Professor of Mathematics, Harvard University (2018-present); Herchel Smith Professor of Mathematics (2023-present); Harvard College Professor (2025-2030).
entries.primary_research_areas: Symplectic geometry, Lagrangian submanifolds, and mirror symmetry
entries.roster_title: Herchel Smith Professor of Mathematics Harvard College Professor

entries.name: DeMarco, Laura
entries.education_history: BA in Mathematics and Physics, University of Virginia (1996); MA in Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley (1998); PhD in Mathematics, Harvard University (2002).
entries.work_professional_background: L. E. Dickson Instructor, University of Chicago (2002-2005); Assistant Professor, University of Chicago (2005-2007); Assistant Professor, University of Illinois Chicago (2007-2009); Associate Professor, University of Illinois Chicago (2009-2012); Professor, University of Illinois Chicago (2012-2014); Professor, Northwestern University (2014-2019); Henry S. Noyes Professor of Mathematics, Northwestern University (2019-2020); Professor of Mathematics, Harvard University (2020-present); Radcliffe Alumnae Professor, Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study (2020-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Dynamical systems, arithmetic geometry, and complex analysis
entries.roster_title: Hollis Professor of Mathematicks and Natural Philosophy

entries.name: Elkies, Noam
entries.roster_title: Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Freed, Dan
entries.primary_research_areas: Geometry and global analysis, with connections to quantum field theory, string theory, and condensed matter theory
entries.roster_title: Shiing-Shen Chern Professor of Mathematics Director of the Center of Mathematical Sciences and Applications (CMSA)

entries.name: Gottlieb, Robin
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Gross, Benedict
entries.education_history: BA, Harvard University (1971); MSc, Oxford University (1974); PhD, Harvard University (1978).
entries.work_professional_background: Assistant Professor, Princeton University (1978-1982); Maître de Conférences, Université de Paris VII (1980); Associate Professor, Brown University (1982-1985); Professor, Harvard University (1985-1998); George Vasmer Leverett Professor, Harvard University (1998-2017); Dean for Undergraduate Education (2002-2003) and Dean of Harvard College (2003-2007); Harvard College Professor (2011-2016).
entries.primary_research_areas: Number theory and representation theory
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Harris, Joe
entries.primary_research_areas: Algebraic geometry
entries.roster_title: Higgins Professor of Mathematics Department Chair

entries.name: Hironaka, Heisuke
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Hopkins, Michael
entries.roster_title: George Putnam Professor of Pure and Applied Mathematics

entries.name: Kazhdan, David
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Kisin, Mark
entries.primary_research_areas: Galois representations, p-adic Hodge theory, and Shimura varieties
entries.roster_title: Perkins Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Kronheimer, Peter
entries.primary_research_areas: Gauge theory, instanton homology, monopoles, and low-dimensional topology
entries.roster_title: William Caspar Graustein Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Maskin, Eric
entries.education_history: AB, Harvard University; PhD, Harvard University.
entries.work_professional_background: Postdoctoral fellow, Jesus College, Cambridge University; faculty member, MIT (1977-1984); faculty member, Harvard University (1985-2000); faculty member, Institute for Advanced Study (2000-2011); rejoined Harvard faculty (2012-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Game theory, contract theory, social choice theory, political economy, and other areas of economics
entries.roster_title: Adams University Professor of Mathematics and Economics

entries.name: Mazur, Barry
entries.work_professional_background: Research Fellow, Institute for Advanced Study (1958-1959); Junior Fellow, Harvard Society of Fellows (1959-1962); Assistant Professor, Harvard University (1962-1965); Associate Professor, Harvard University (1965-1969); Professor of Mathematics, Harvard University (1969-1982); William Petschek Professor of Mathematics, Harvard University (1982-1998); Gerhard Gade University Professor, Harvard University (1998-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Number theory, automorphic forms, related issues in algebraic geometry, and philosophy of mathematics
entries.roster_title: Gerhard Gade University Professor

entries.name: McMullen, Curtis
entries.primary_research_areas: Complex dynamics, Teichmüller theory, moduli spaces, and hyperbolic geometry
entries.roster_title: Maria Moors Cabot Professor of the Natural Sciences

entries.name: Mumford, David
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Nowak, Martin
entries.work_professional_background: Held professorships at the University of Oxford and the Institute for Advanced Study in Princeton before joining Harvard University in 2003; Professor of Mathematics and of Biology at Harvard University (2003-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Theoretical and evolutionary biology, including evolutionary dynamics, virus dynamics, mathematical oncology, and evolution of cooperation
entries.roster_title: Professor of Mathematics and of Biology On Leave

entries.name: Popa, Mihnea
entries.education_history: BS in Mathematics, University of Bucharest (1996); graduate study, University of California, Los Angeles (1996-1997); PhD in Mathematics, University of Michigan (2001).
entries.work_professional_background: Benjamin Peirce Assistant Professor, Harvard University (2001-2005); Assistant Professor, University of Chicago (2005-2007); Associate Professor, University of Illinois Chicago (2007-2011); Professor, University of Illinois Chicago (2011-2014); Professor, Northwestern University (2014-2020); Professor, Harvard University (2020-present).
entries.primary_research_areas: Algebraic geometry, birational geometry, Hodge theory, and singularities
entries.roster_title: Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Schmid, Wilfried
entries.primary_research_areas: Representation theory, automorphic forms and distributions, and Lie groups
entries.roster_title: Professor Emeritus

entries.name: Siu, Yum-Tong
entries.roster_title: William Elwood Byerly Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Taubes, Cliff
entries.primary_research_areas: Nonlinear partial differential equations and applications to topology, geometry, and mathematical physics
entries.roster_title: William Petschek Professor of Mathematics Director of Undergraduate Studies

entries.name: Williams, Lauren
entries.education_history: AB in Mathematics, Harvard University (2000); Part III of the Mathematical Tripos, University of Cambridge (2001); PhD in Mathematics, MIT (2005).
entries.work_professional_background: NSF Postdoctoral Fellow, UC Berkeley (2005-2006); Benjamin Peirce Assistant Professor and NSF Postdoctoral Fellow, Harvard University (2006-2009); Assistant Professor, UC Berkeley (2009-2013); Associate Professor, UC Berkeley (2013-2016); Professor, UC Berkeley (2016-2020); Professor, Harvard University (2018-present); Dwight Parker Robinson Professor of Mathematics (2019-present); Sally Starling Seaver Professor, Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study (2018-2025).
entries.primary_research_areas: Algebraic combinatorics, cluster algebras, total positivity, and Schubert calculus
entries.roster_title: Dwight Parker Robinson Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Wood, Melanie Matchett
entries.education_history: BS in Mathematics, Duke University (2003); Certificate of Advanced Study in Mathematics, University of Cambridge (2004); PhD in Mathematics, Princeton University (2009).
entries.work_professional_background: Szegő Assistant Professor, Stanford University (2009-2011); Research Member, MSRI (Spring 2011); Assistant Professor, University of Wisconsin-Madison (2011-2017); Professor, University of Wisconsin-Madison (2017); Vilas Distinguished Achievement Professor, University of Wisconsin-Madison (2017-2019); Chancellor’s Professor, UC Berkeley (2019-2021); William Caspar Graustein Professor of Mathematics, Harvard University (2020-present); Radcliffe Alumnae Professor, Radcliffe Institute for Advanced Study (2020-2025).
entries.primary_research_areas: Number theory, arithmetic and algebraic geometry, probability, and random groups
entries.roster_title: William Caspar Graustein Professor of Mathematics Director of Graduate Studies

entries.name: Woodin, Hugh
entries.primary_research_areas: Set theory, determinacy, and strong axioms of infinity
entries.roster_title: Professor of Mathematics and of Philosophy

entries.name: Yau, Horng-Tzer
entries.primary_research_areas: Probability theory, quantum dynamics, random matrices, differential equations, and nonequilibrium physics
entries.roster_title: Merton Professor of Mathematics

entries.name: Yau, Shing-Tung
entries.primary_research_areas: Differential geometry, partial differential equations, topology, and mathematical physics
entries.roster_title: Professors Emeritus

entries.name: Michael P. Brenner
entries.education_history: PhD in Physics, University of Chicago (advisor: Leo Kadanoff).
entries.work_professional_background: First faculty position in the Mathematics Department at MIT; joined the Harvard faculty in 2002 and is a faculty member in SEAS and Physics.
entries.primary_research_areas: Soft matter, biophysics, fluid mechanics, materials science, and applied mathematics, including molecular computation, rheology, morphogenesis, and self-assembly
entries.roster_title: Catalyst Professor of Applied Mathematics and Applied Physics and of Physics

entries.name: SueYeon Chung
entries.education_history: PhD in Applied Physics, Harvard University; BA in Physics and Mathematics, Cornell University.
entries.work_professional_background: Led a research group at the Center for Computational Neuroscience at the Flatiron Institute while holding a joint appointment as assistant professor at NYU; previously postdoctoral fellow at the Center for Theoretical Neuroscience at Columbia University and Fellow in Computation in MIT's Department of Brain and Cognitive Sciences; later joined Harvard as Assistant Professor of Physics and of Applied Mathematics and Institute Investigator at the Kempner Institute and Center for Brain Science.
entries.primary_research_areas: Mathematical theory of biological and artificial neural networks, representation geometry, and neurally plausible learning in brain-like models
entries.roster_title: Assistant Professor of Physics and of Applied Mathematics

entries.name: Yu-Chi Larry Ho
entries.primary_research_areas: Discrete event dynamic systems, perturbation analysis, ordinal optimization, and sensor networks and complex systems
entries.roster_title: T Jefferson Coolidge Professor of Applied Mathematics, Emeritus

entries.name: Efthimios Kaxiras
entries.primary_research_areas: Computational physics and materials theory, multiscale modeling, machine learning for materials, and two-dimensional materials and twistronics
entries.roster_title: John Hasbrouck Van Vleck Professor of Pure and Applied Physics

entries.name: Petros Koumoutsakos
entries.primary_research_areas: Computational science and engineering, scientific machine learning, fluid dynamics, microfluidics, and bio-inspired systems
entries.roster_title: Herbert S. Winokur, Jr. Professor of Computing in Science and Engineering

entries.name: Yue Lu
entries.education_history: MSc in Mathematics and PhD in Electrical Engineering, University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (2007).
entries.work_professional_background: Postdoctoral researcher at the Audiovisual Communications Laboratory at EPFL before joining the Harvard faculty; currently Gordon McKay Professor of Electrical Engineering and of Applied Mathematics, affiliated with Statistics, and since 2024 also Harvard College Professor.
entries.primary_research_areas: Probability, statistics, signal processing, information theory, high-dimensional statistical inference, and statistical learning
entries.roster_title: Gordon McKay Professor of Electrical Engineering and of Applied Mathematics

entries.name: L Mahadevan
entries.primary_research_areas: Soft matter, fluid dynamics, elasticity, morphogenesis, physiology, ethology and cognition, and optimization and control
entries.roster_title: Lola England de Valpine Professor of Applied Mathematics, of Organismic and Evolutionary Biology, and of Physics

entries.name: Cengiz Pehlevan
entries.primary_research_areas: Theory of neural networks, theoretical and computational neuroscience, deep learning theory, physics of learning, statistical mechanics, and high-dimensional statistics
entries.roster_title: Associate Professor of Applied Mathematics

entries.name: Anna Seigal
entries.education_history: PhD in Mathematics, University of California, Berkeley (2014-2019); Master of Mathematics (Part III), Emmanuel College, University of Cambridge (2013-2014); BA (Hons) in Mathematics, Emmanuel College, University of Cambridge (2010-2013).
entries.work_professional_background: Assistant Professor of Applied Mathematics at Harvard University and Affiliate in Statistics (2023-present); previously Junior Fellow at the Harvard Society of Fellows (2021-2023) and Hooke Research Fellow and Junior Research Fellow at the Mathematical Institute and The Queen's College, University of Oxford (2019-2021).
entries.primary_research_areas: Applied algebra, tensors and multilinear algebra, applied algebraic geometry, algebraic statistics, and mathematical problems in data science
entries.roster_title: Assistant Professor of Applied Mathematics

entries.name: Nick Trefethen
entries.education_history: AB summa cum laude in Applied Mathematics, Harvard College (1977); MS in Computer Science/Numerical Analysis, Stanford University (1980); PhD in Computer Science/Numerical Analysis, Stanford University (1982).
entries.work_professional_background: Professor of Applied Mathematics in Residence at Harvard since September 2023; previously Professor of Numerical Analysis and head of the Numerical Analysis Group at the University of Oxford (1997-2023), Global Distinguished Professor at NYU (2013-2019), faculty member at Cornell University (1991-1997), MIT (1984-1991), and NSF Postdoctoral Fellow/Adjunct Assistant Professor at the Courant Institute, NYU (1982-1984).
entries.primary_research_areas: Numerical analysis, scientific computing, approximation theory, and spectral methods
entries.roster_title: Professor of Applied Mathematics in Residence

entries.name: Eli Tziperman
entries.primary_research_areas: Ocean, atmosphere, and climate dynamics, including El Niño, AMOC and large-scale ocean circulation, ice ages, and past and future climate change
entries.roster_title: Pamela and Vasco McCoy, Jr. Professor of Oceanography and Applied Physics

entries.name: Melanie Weber
entries.education_history: PhD in Applied Mathematics, Princeton University (2021); BSc/MSc in Mathematics and Physics, University of Leipzig (2016).
entries.work_professional_background: Assistant Professor of Applied Mathematics and of Computer Science at Harvard (2023-present); previously Hooke Research Fellow at the Mathematical Institute, University of Oxford (2021-2022), Nicolas Kurti Junior Research Fellow at Brasenose College, Oxford, and Research Fellow at the Simons Institute in Berkeley (2021); also held visiting positions at MIT and the Max Planck Institute for Mathematics in the Sciences and interned with Facebook, Google, and Microsoft research labs.
entries.primary_research_areas: Geometric machine learning, optimization with provable guarantees, data geometry, graph machine learning, optimization on manifolds, and learning in non-Euclidean spaces
entries.roster_title: Assistant Professor of Applied Mathematics and of Computer Science
